moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Kicks Off!
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival runs from June 18-21, 2026, featuring a massive lineup of legendary artists and current stars.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Who's ready for the Isle of Wight Festival? The gates open tomorrow for four days of incredible music! Who are you most excited to see?

angles.name: Headliner Hype
angles.copy: Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, The Cure, Sex Pistols ft. Frank Carter, Teddy Swims... the Isle of Wight Festival lineup is absolutely stacked this year!

angles.name: Festival Essentials
angles.copy: Heading to the Isle of Wight Festival? Don't forget your wellies, sun cream, and a fully charged phone to capture all the memories! What are your festival essentials?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Takes Over Glasgow
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green hosts the TRNSMT Festival from June 19-21, 2026, with headliners like Lewis Capaldi, Kasabian, and Richard Ashcroft.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Glasgow, are you ready? TRNSMT Festival kicks off on Friday! Get set for an epic weekend at Glasgow Green.

angles.name: Scottish Talent Spotlight
angles.copy: Huge Scottish talent on show at TRNSMT this weekend, with Lewis Capaldi and Amy Macdonald leading the charge! Who are you rooting for?

angles.name: City Festival Vibe
angles.copy: TRNSMT brings the festival buzz right into the heart of Glasgow. No camping needed, just pure music energy!

moments.title: Summer Solstice: Longest Day of the Year
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of 2026, occurs on Sunday, June 21st at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready to soak up the sun! Sunday marks the Summer Solstice, the longest day of the year. How will you make the most of the extra daylight?

angles.name: Sunrise/Sunset
angles.copy: The Summer Solstice arrives this Sunday at 9:24 AM BST. Expect nearly 17 hours of daylight in the south and even more in the north!

angles.name: Stonehenge Connection
angles.copy: Many will gather at Stonehenge to welcome the Summer Solstice sunrise this Sunday, continuing an ancient tradition. Will you be watching?

moments.title: Wimbledon Warm-Up Begins
moments.blurb: While Wimbledon officially starts June 29th, the pre-tournament buzz is building, with themed events and excitement for the Grand Slam.

angles.name: General Anticipation
angles.copy: The grass courts are almost ready! Wimbledon is just around the corner, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to London. Who's your favourite to win?

angles.name: London Themed Events
angles.copy: Getting into the Wimbledon spirit in London? Look out for themed afternoon teas and events popping up across the city ahead of the tournament!

moments.title: Happy 39th Birthday, Kendrick Lamar!
moments.blurb: Today, June 17th, marks the 39th birthday of Pulitzer Prize-winning rapper and songwriter Kendrick Lamar.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 39th Birthday to the incredible Kendrick Lamar! What's your favourite track from the rap icon?

angles.name: Music Influence
angles.copy: From 'DAMN.' to 'To Pimp a Butterfly,' Kendrick Lamar has consistently pushed boundaries. Celebrating his 39th birthday today!

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday, Barry Manilow!
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Barry Manilow celebrates his 83rd birthday today, June 17th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Could it be magic? It's Barry Manilow's 83rd birthday today! Sending love to the 'Copacabana' singer.

angles.name: Timeless Hits
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the man behind so many timeless ballads, Barry Manilow! Which of his hits is your all-time favourite?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Gregg Rolie!
moments.blurb: Gregg Rolie, co-founder of Santana and Journey, and a key figure in classic rock, turns 79 today, June 17th.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to rock legend Gregg Rolie! From Santana to Journey, his keyboard and vocals defined an era. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Influence on Rock
angles.copy: Celebrating Gregg Rolie's 79th today! A founding member of two iconic bands, his sound is woven into the fabric of rock history.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Paul Young (Sad Café/Mike + the Mechanics)!
moments.blurb: Paul Young, the Manchester-born singer from Sad Café and Mike + the Mechanics, turns 79 today, June 17th.

angles.name: UK Music Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to Paul Young of Sad Café and Mike + the Mechanics! A true voice of British music. What's your favourite song?

angles.name: Band Legacy
angles.copy: From 'Run Home Girl' with Sad Café to 'Living Years' with Mike + the Mechanics, Paul Young's voice is unforgettable. Happy 79th Birthday!

moments.title: Cardiff Castle's Busy Gig Week
moments.blurb: Cardiff Castle hosts a series of concerts this week, including Ethel Cain, Garbage & Skunk Anansie, Empire of the Sun, McFly, and the Blackbird Festival.

angles.name: Cardiff Music Scene
angles.copy: Cardiff Castle is buzzing with live music this week! From Ethel Cain to Garbage & Skunk Anansie, there's something for every rock and indie fan.

angles.name: Blackbird Festival
angles.copy: Rock fans, get ready for Blackbird Festival at Cardiff Castle on June 27th, headlined by Alter Bridge with special guests Skindred! Who's going?

angles.name: McFly Mania
angles.copy: McFly are bringing their pop-rock hits to Cardiff Castle on June 25th – but it's sold out! Hope you got your tickets!

moments.title: Live Music in Exeter This Week
moments.blurb: Exeter hosts a range of gigs this week, including Electric Six, Teddy Swims, Alanis Morissette, and Lewis Capaldi at Powderham Castle.

angles.name: Exeter Music Highlights
angles.copy: Exeter's music scene is alive this week! Catch Electric Six at Exeter Phoenix or plan for Teddy Swims, Alanis Morissette and Lewis Capaldi at Powderham Castle!

angles.name: Powderham Castle Big Names
angles.copy: Powderham Castle is gearing up for some huge names next week with Teddy Swims, Alanis Morissette, and Lewis Capaldi all playing! Who's got tickets?

moments.title: The Bunkhouse Swansea's Busy Week
moments.blurb: The Bunkhouse in Swansea has a packed schedule this week with Light Through Sound, Stone Deaf, Alabama Crow, Andrew Cushin, WRKHOUSE, and SNAYX.

angles.name: Swansea Local Gigs
angles.copy: Supporting local music in Swansea this week? The Bunkhouse has a fantastic lineup, starting with Light Through Sound tonight!

angles.name: WRKHOUSE Spotlight
angles.copy: Welsh alt-pop band WRKHOUSE are at The Bunkhouse on June 26th as part of the 'Everywhere At Once' festival. Don't miss out!

moments.title: UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The Official Singles Chart Top 40 for June 11-17, 2026, features new entries from Maria Jane Smith, Isabel LaRosa, and María Peláe.

angles.name: New Chart Entries
angles.copy: New music alert! The latest UK Singles Chart Top 40 is out, with fresh tracks from Maria Jane Smith, Isabel LaRosa, and María Peláe making an impact.

angles.name: Who's Top?
angles.copy: What's holding strong at the top of the UK Singles Chart this week? Tune in to find out which track is dominating the airwaves!
